```python
class Solution:
    def concatHex36(self, n: int) -> str:
        hex_map = "0123456789ABCDEF"
        base36_map = "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
        
        n2 = n * n
        hex_str = ""
        while n2 > 0:
            hex_str = hex_map[n2 % 16] + hex_str
            n2 //= 16
        
        n3 = n * n * n
        base36_str = ""
        while n3 > 0:
            base36_str = base36_map[n3 % 36] + base36_str
            n3 //= 36
        
        return hex_str + base36_str
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(log n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution utilizes two while loops to convert the squared and cubed values of n into hexadecimal and base-36 representations, respectively, and then concatenates the resulting strings.
